summary: Iteration 41 - Refactoring verification complete. All 16 backend tests passed. All frontend pages load correctly. The refactoring extracted code to modules (database.py, auth.py, models/schemas.py, routes/admin_routes.py) with zero behavior change.
critical_code_review_comments: database.py correctly exports db, client, and logger - VERIFIED
auth.py correctly exports get_jwt_secret, hash_password, verify_password, create_access_token, create_refresh_token, get_current_user, JWT_ALGORITHM - VERIFIED
models/schemas.py exports all Pydantic models (UserRegister, UserLogin, etc.) - VERIFIED
routes/admin_routes.py has its own APIRouter included via api_router.include_router() - VERIFIED
GET /api/health returns healthy status - VERIFIED
POST /api/auth/login works with admin@aic.it / Admin123! - VERIFIED
POST /api/auth/register creates new user with plan='free' field - VERIFIED
GET /api/catalog returns 136 procedures - VERIFIED
GET /api/catalog/categories returns 7 categories - VERIFIED
GET /api/catalog/COMPANY_CLOSURE/pre-start returns orientation + dependencies + international - VERIFIED
GET /api/catalog/COMPANY_CLOSURE/dependencies returns linked obligations - VERIFIED
GET /api/dashboard/stats returns practice data - VERIFIED
GET /api/admin/stats returns user and practice statistics (from extracted route file) - VERIFIED
GET /api/admin/stats?window=today works with time filter - VERIFIED
GET /api/admin/stats returns 403 for non-admin users - VERIFIED
GET /api/practices returns user practices - VERIFIED
GET /api/practices/{id}/workspace returns full workspace with tracking - VERIFIED
GET /api/notifications returns notifications - VERIFIED
GET /api/reminders returns reminders - VERIFIED
POST /api/practices/{id}/tracking works for tracking reference - VERIFIED
Dashboard page loads correctly at /dashboard - VERIFIED
Catalog page loads correctly at /catalog with 7 category filters - VERIFIED
Services page loads correctly at /services - VERIFIED
Admin stats page loads at /admin/stats with user/practice statistics - VERIFIED
Create practice flow shows 3 steps (Scegli → Preparati → Conferma) with 5 client types - VERIFIED
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - tested existing seeded data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 41 verified the refactoring from 7414 to 7104 lines in server.py. Key verified: (1) database.py exports db, client, logger. (2) auth.py exports all auth functions. (3) models/schemas.py exports all Pydantic models. (4) routes/admin_routes.py has admin stats endpoint with proper 403 for non-admin. (5) All 22 endpoints tested work identically. (6) Frontend pages all load correctly. (7) Create practice flow shows 5 client types. (8) Catalog shows 7 categories with 136 total procedures.
